headline: MRNA Up as Influenza Vaccine Wins Unanimous FDA Advisory Panel Backing
summary: Moderna stock gains 3.5% after FDA advisory panel votes 9-0 that mFlusiva's benefits outweigh risks in influenza prevention in older adults, ahead of an Aug. 5 decision.

raw.headline: MRNA Up as Influenza Vaccine Wins Unanimous FDA Advisory Panel Backing
raw.summary: Moderna stock gains 3.5% after FDA advisory panel votes 9-0 that mFlusiva's benefits outweigh risks in influenza prevention in older adults, ahead of an Aug. 5 decision.

headline: Moderna's Flu Vaccine Clears Key FDA Panel Vote As Advisory Committee Backs Shot 9-0
summary: Moderna’s experimental flu vaccine won unanimous FDA panel backing ahead of an Aug. 5 decision.

raw.headline: Moderna's Flu Vaccine Clears Key FDA Panel Vote As Advisory Committee Backs Shot 9-0
